message:
feat(core,conformance): supply-chain attestation and SBOM normative types

Add canonical supply-chain object shapes for FCP2:

- crates/fcp-core/src/supply_chain.rs (1015 lines): SupplyChainAttestation
  and SoftwareBillOfMaterials structs with structural validation,
  deterministic canonical encodings (JSON + CBOR), content hashing via
  SHA-256, signing bytes with schema-domain separation, SLSA level
  provenance binding, trust root references, and builder allowlists
- crates/fcp-conformance/src/schemas/SupplyChainAttestation_v1.schema.json:
  JSON Schema enforcing predicate_type enum (SLSA provenance + in-toto),
  blake3-256/sha256 digest patterns, material URI format, trust root shape
- crates/fcp-conformance/src/schemas/Sbom_v1.schema.json: JSON Schema for
  CycloneDX-shaped component inventories with hash validation, license
  arrays, and dependency graph structure
- crates/fcp-conformance/tests/supply_chain_schema.rs (248 lines):
  integration tests for schema validation, CBOR determinism, and
  negative-case rejection
- Validation functions: validate_supply_chain_attestation() and
  validate_sbom() added to conformance schemas module
- sha2 dependency added to fcp-core for content digest computation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
